properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret Key for JWT Authentication'

properties.name: tmdb.api.token
properties.description: A description for 'tmdb.api.token'

properties.name: app.domain
properties.description: A description for 'app.domain'

properties.name: verified.sender
properties.description: A description for 'verified.sender'

properties.name: spring.flyway.enabled
properties.description: A description for 'spring.flyway.enabled'

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate
properties.description: A description for 'spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate'

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-version
properties.description: A description for 'spring.flyway.baseline-version'

properties.name: watchmate.discovery.sync.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the daily discovery sync scheduler.

properties.name: watchmate.discovery.sync.startup-enabled
properties.description: Whether startup discovery sync should run when the application becomes ready.

properties.name: watchmate.show-hydration.max-synchronous-missing-seasons
properties.description: Maximum number of missing show seasons that may be hydrated synchronously during a bulk show tracking request.

properties.name: watchmate.show-hydration.max-synchronous-episodes
properties.description: Maximum number of missing show episodes that may be hydrated synchronously during a bulk show tracking request.

properties.name: watchmate.show-hydration.batch-size
properties.description: Number of show seasons to hydrate per bounded batch step.

properties.name: watchmate.show-jobs.enabled
properties.description: Whether background show tracking jobs are enabled.

properties.name: watchmate.show-jobs.poll-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between show tracking job polling cycles.

properties.name: watchmate.show-jobs.max-jobs-per-poll
properties.description: Maximum number of pending show tracking jobs to attempt per polling cycle.

properties.name: watchmate.show-jobs.stale-running-minutes
properties.description: Minutes after which a running show tracking job is considered stale and eligible for recovery.

properties.name: watchmate.show-jobs.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of processing attempts for one show tracking job before it is marked failed.

properties.name: watchmate.cache.enabled
properties.description: Whether Redis-backed application caching is enabled.

properties.name: watchmate.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Allowed CORS origins for backend API requests.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.host
properties.description: Redis host used by Spring Cache.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.port
properties.description: Redis port used by Spring Cache.

properties.name: spring.data.redis.password
properties.description: Optional Redis password used by Spring Cache.
